prose:
Benzene Frontier Orbital Energies — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided via /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/benzene/benzene.xyz. SCF converged in 8 cycles.

The calculation reports:
*   HOMO energy: -7.04683 eV
*   LUMO energy: -0.41575 eV
*   HOMO-LUMO Gap: 6.63109 eV

No warnings were reported.
